n. Old World boas: pythons; in some classifications considered a separate family from Boidae

entries.t: [网络] 网纹蟒；蟒蛇皮；网纹巨蛇
n. 巨蛇, 大蟒( python的复数形式 )
entries.d:
n. large Old World boas
n. a soothsaying spirit or a person who is possessed by such a spirit
n. (Greek mythology) dragon killed by Apollo at Delphi

entries.t: [网络] 非洲岩蟒；英文名；拉丁学名

entries.d: n. presence of white blood cells in the urine; symptom of urinary tract infection

entries.t: [医] 扑蛲灵, 扑蛲喹(驱蛲虫药)

n. 圣体容器, 硬币样品盒
vt. 检验(硬币的)重量和纯度
entries.d:
n. a chest in which coins from the mint are held to await assay
n. any receptacle in which wafers for the Eucharist are kept
a. Having a pyxidium.

entries.t: n. (pyxis的复数)药箱, 宝石盒,[植]盖果
entries.d:
n fruit of such plants as the plantain; a capsule whose upper part falls off when the seeds are released
n a constellation in the southern hemisphere near Puppis and Antlia
n a small box used by ancient Greeks to hold medicines

entries.t: n. 盖果( pyxidium的名词复数 )
entries.d: pl. of Pyxidium
n. fruit of such plants as the plantain; a capsule whose upper part falls off when the seeds are released
n creeping evergreen shrub having narrow overlapping leaves and early white star-shaped flowers; of the pine barrens of New Jersey and the Carolinas

entries.t:
n. 有盖瓶, 小箱
[医] 盖果

n. a constellation in the southern hemisphere near Puppis and Antlia
